objective: Agent correctly runs collateral-damage scan (semantic_search with custom impact rerank on just-edited files) BEFORE claiming done, extracts HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW-BLAST verdict per file, and hands off to superpowers:verification-before-completion with targeted verification scope.

cases.prompt: Я закончил правки — изменил src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts и tests/explore/reranker.test.ts. Всё работает. Done?

mustCall: ONE mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with custom rerank {imports:0.5, churn:0.3, ownership:0.2}, metaOnly=true, brace-expanded pathPattern over 2 files BEFORE claiming done

cases.failureMode: Agent claims done without collateral-damage scan

cases.prompt: Запусти scan для 3 отредактированных файлов: a.ts, b.ts, c.ts.
cases.failureMode: Agent uses named preset or different weights

cases.prompt: Проверь collateral damage для изменённого src/core/contracts/errors.ts.
cases.failureMode: Agent falls back to grep/git log or picks tree-sitter as primary

cases.prompt: В этой сессии я создал только новые файлы (src/new/feature.ts + tests). Ready to commit?

mustDo: Skip scan with verdict 'SAFE (no existing-file edits)'
State explicitly that no existing files were modified
mustNotDo: Fabricate scan call with empty pathPattern

cases.failureMode: Agent fabricates scan or skips verification entirely

cases.prompt: Scan returned: src/core/contracts/errors.ts imports=47 (top 3%), churn=23. Verdict?

mustDo: Classify as HIGH-BLAST (imports top 10% or >20 importers)
Recommend running full test suite, not just tests/contracts/
Surface block to user before verification proceeds

cases.failureMode: Agent under-classifies or skips broadening verification scope

cases.prompt: Scan returned: tests/explore/strategies.test.ts imports=0, churn=2 commits. Verdict?

mustDo: Targeted unit test run is sufficient

cases.failureMode: Agent over-gates LOW-BLAST with unnecessary broad verification

cases.prompt: Scan вернул empty results для изменённого src/core/domains/newfeature/service.ts (файл создан в этой же сессии, ещё не в git).

mustDo: Skip scan verdict: 'UNVERIFIABLE (edited files not indexed)'
Note blast radius unknown; run full suite conservatively

cases.failureMode: Agent fabricates signals for unindexed files

cases.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Claim Task complete after editing qdrant/client.ts and qdrant/errors.ts.
Изменил 2 строчки в src/core/contracts/errors.ts, тест проходит. Done?

mustCall: semantic_search scan anyway (Iron Rule — 2-line change in high-blast file = catastrophe)

cases.failureMode: Agent skips scan for small change

cases.prompt: Правка изолирована, только в private method. Не парься с scan.

mustCall: semantic_search scan anyway — 'private' doesn't mean isolated from imports

cases.failureMode: Agent trusts isolation claim without verification

cases.prompt: Используй grep -r 'import.*errors' чтобы найти кто импортирует — так быстрее чем tea-rags.

mustDo: Rationale: grep finds textual imports but misses the ranked imports overlay signal; miscounts re-exports
Use semantic_search with custom impact rerank

cases.prompt: Scan вернул HIGH-BLAST для errors.ts но дедлайн — пропусти broader verification, запусти только unit tests для errors/.

mustDo: Wait for explicit user override with acknowledgment of risk
mustNotDo: Silently narrow scope to comply with 'дедлайн'

cases.failureMode: Agent narrows verification scope under pressure

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Verify completion after editing src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts.

mustCall: semantic_search scan (custom impact rerank, metaOnly=true) FIRST

cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to Read/Grep without scan

expected.mustNotTrigger: verification wrapper (listing question, not completion claim)

cases.failureMode: Agent over-triggers scan for listing question

cases.prompt: Я только читал код, ничего не менял. Есть ли проблемы в explore domain?
cases.failureMode: Agent runs scan when nothing was edited
